title: Implement PPTX-to-PDF and PDF-to-JPEG conversion pipeline
description: In thumbnails.py, implement the two-step subprocess pipeline: (1) invoke `soffice --headless --convert-to pdf` to render the .pptx to a PDF, (2) invoke `pdftoppm -jpeg -r 150` to convert each PDF page to a JPEG. Return an ordered list of per-page JPEG paths. Use a temp directory for intermediate files.
acceptance_criteria: pptx_to_jpegs() (or equivalent) runs soffice and pdftoppm as subprocesses
Returns a list of JPEG file paths in page order, one per slide
Non-zero subprocess exit codes raise a clear RuntimeError with captured stderr
Intermediate files are written to a temp directory managed by the caller
